name: Moving Help
tagline: Professional loading, transport, and unloading — same day available.
description: Junky Rabbit Labor provides two-man moving crews with a 20-foot truck so you can relocate without the stress. We handle apartment moves, house-to-house moves, single-item transport, and furniture delivery across Metro Detroit. Our crew arrives on time, works efficiently, and treats your belongings with care. No hidden fees — just hourly labor you can count on.
includes: Loading and unloading at both locations
Transport within all of Metro Detroit
No surprise fees — flat hourly rate
imgAlt: Junky Rabbit moving crew loading furniture into truck Detroit Metro

reviews.author: Denetra Mason
reviews.reviewBody: I needed last-minute help moving and clearing out junk, and Junky Rabbit Labor came through big time. They were quick, respectful, and made the whole process stress-free. You can tell they really care about their customers. I'll definitely be using them again.

reviews.author: Marcus T.
reviews.reviewBody: Used Junky Rabbit to move my apartment across town on short notice. Two guys showed up with a truck, had everything loaded in under an hour, and nothing got scratched. Price was exactly what they quoted. Couldn't ask for better service.

faq.q: How far in advance do I need to book?
faq.a: Same-day is often available. Text 248.818.1130 and we'll tell you our earliest opening. Booking 24–48 hours ahead guarantees your preferred time.

faq.q: Is there a minimum charge?
faq.a: Yes — we have a 2-hour minimum at $90/hr, so the minimum charge is $180 for a standard move. Clock starts when we arrive, ends when the last piece is placed.

faq.q: Do you move large appliances and pianos?
faq.a: We handle furniture, appliances, and heavy items. Text us a quick description of your items for a heads-up before we arrive — appliances like fridges and washers are no problem.

faq.q: Do you travel outside of Metro Detroit?
faq.a: Our primary coverage is Metro Detroit. For longer-distance moves, text us — we can quote a flat rate for travel beyond the standard service area.

faq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: Cash, Venmo, CashApp, and Apple Pay. Payment is due at the end of the job.

name: Junk Removal & Cleanouts
priceNote: Curb pickup up to 5 items · full cleanouts quoted by volume
tagline: Same-day junk hauling and full property cleanouts in Metro Detroit.
description: Whether it's a single couch on the curb or an entire basement cleanout, Junky Rabbit Labor gets it done fast. We haul away furniture, appliances, mattresses, yard waste, construction debris, and just about anything else you need gone. Our crew loads everything and leaves the space spotless. Pricing is upfront — no surprises after the job.
includes: Full loading — we do all the heavy lifting
imgAlt: Before and after junk removal cleanout Detroit property

reviews.author: Nikhil Bhat
reviews.reviewBody: Had these guys clean out a nasty tenant turnover that had a bunch of broken furniture in it, cat urine, cat feces, rotting food, etc. They cleared it all out very quickly, and deep cleaned it and practically made it look brand new for a really amazing price. They saved me from a very difficult tenant situation and I can't thank them enough. Had them out in less than 48 hours from first contact. They were on time, and communication was extremely professional. Can't thank you enough! Would highly recommend and use again!

reviews.author: Keisha W.
reviews.reviewBody: I had a full basement to clean out after my mom passed and didn't know where to start. Junky Rabbit came out the next day, hauled everything away, and left the space completely clean. They were kind, fast, and priced fairly. Highly recommend to anyone needing a cleanout done right.

faq.q: What items can't you take?
faq.a: We can't take hazardous waste, chemicals, paint, or tires. Everything else — furniture, appliances, mattresses, debris, electronics — is fair game.

faq.q: How is pricing determined for a full cleanout?
faq.a: Curb pickups (up to 5 items) start at $75. Larger cleanouts are priced by volume — text us a few photos and we'll send a quote within minutes.

faq.q: Do you offer same-day junk removal?
faq.a: Yes. Same-day pickups are available most days. Text 248.818.1130 with your location and what needs to go and we'll confirm a same-day window.

faq.q: Will you clean up after removal?
faq.a: Absolutely. We leave the space broom-clean. If it's a full room cleanout, we sweep and make sure nothing is left behind.

faq.q: Can you remove items from inside the house?
faq.a: Yes — full-service removal means we carry items out from any room, basement, or upper floor. You don't need to move anything to the curb.

name: Snow Removal
priceNote: Residential driveways · commercial lots quoted separately
tagline: Fast residential snow clearing — driveways and sidewalks done right.
description: When Detroit's winter hits, Junky Rabbit Labor is ready. We clear residential driveways, sidewalks, and walkways quickly and thoroughly. Salt and ice treatment available on request. Commercial properties and multi-unit buildings can receive a custom seasonal quote. Don't get stuck — text us and we'll be out the same day.
imgAlt: Snow removal service driveway clearing Detroit Metro Michigan

reviews.author: Brian K.
reviews.reviewBody: Texted Junky Rabbit at 7am after a big overnight snowfall and they were at my driveway by 9. Fast, thorough, and salted afterward. Way easier than dealing with it myself. Will have them on speed dial all winter.

reviews.author: Sandra L.
reviews.reviewBody: Used them twice this winter for driveway and walkway clearing. Both times they showed up quickly and did a great job. Good communication and fair pricing. Exactly what you want when you're stuck and need help fast.

faq.q: How quickly can you respond during a snowstorm?
faq.a: We aim for same-day response. Text us as soon as you know you need service and we'll give you an ETA based on current demand.

faq.q: Do you offer seasonal snow removal contracts?
faq.a: Yes — we can set up a seasonal arrangement for repeat customers. Text 248.818.1130 to discuss pricing for ongoing service.

faq.q: Do you salt and treat for ice?
faq.a: Yes, salting and ice treatment are available as an add-on to any snow removal job.

faq.q: What size driveways do you clear?
faq.a: We handle single and double driveways, as well as commercial parking areas. Text us details and we'll quote accordingly.

name: Painting
priceNote: Full rooms from $250 · includes wall prep and priming
tagline: Clean, precise interior painting with full wall prep included.
description: Junky Rabbit Labor provides interior residential painting that's clean, fast, and affordable. Every job includes wall prep — filling holes, sanding rough spots, and priming when needed — before a single drop of paint goes on the wall. We offer touch-up painting, full-room refreshes, and multi-room packages. No cutting corners, no mess left behind.
includes: Clean edge cutting and trim work
Cleanup — tarps, tape, and drop cloths removed
imgAlt: Interior painting service Detroit Metro residential

reviews.author: Tanya R.
reviews.reviewBody: Had two bedrooms and a hallway painted. They patched all the nail holes, primed, and put on two clean coats. Everything looked sharp — good edges, no drips. They cleaned up completely before leaving. Very happy with the result and the price.

reviews.author: James F.
reviews.reviewBody: Hired Junky Rabbit to refresh my living room before listing my house. They prepped the walls properly and the paint job looked professional. They finished in one day, which I didn't expect. Would use them again for sure.

faq.q: Do I need to supply paint?
faq.a: You can supply your own paint or we can source it. If you supply paint we deduct that cost from the estimate — just have it ready before we arrive.

faq.q: Does pricing include wall prep?
faq.a: Yes. Every painting job includes filling nail holes, light sanding, and taping. Extensive repairs (large holes, water damage) may be quoted separately.

faq.q: How long does a room take?
faq.a: A standard bedroom takes 3–5 hours depending on prep. Large rooms or rooms requiring two coats take longer. We'll give you a time estimate upfront.

faq.q: Do you do exterior painting?
faq.a: Currently we focus on interior residential painting. For exterior painting requests, text us — we may be able to accommodate on a project basis.

name: Yard Cleanup & Landscaping
priceNote: Priced by scope · bush trimming · debris removal · lot cleanup
tagline: Bush trimming, leaf removal, and overgrown lot cleanup in Metro Detroit.
description: Overgrown yard? Piles of leaves? Bushes that got out of hand? Junky Rabbit Labor handles yard cleanup and debris hauling throughout Metro Detroit. We trim bushes, remove leaf and debris piles, haul away yard waste, and clean up vacant or overgrown lots. All debris is hauled away — no piles left on the curb. Free estimates on all yard work.
includes: All yard waste hauled away — not left at curb
imgAlt: Clean yard after Junky Rabbit yard cleanup and debris hauling Detroit

reviews.author: Danny
reviews.reviewBody: Junky Rabbit responded to me right away on Nextdoor with a great price to mow my overgrown lawn. Lunden was prompt, courteous and professional. He showed up on time and got the job done even in the rain. Thank you!

reviews.author: Carla M.
reviews.reviewBody: My backyard was completely out of control — overgrown bushes, leaf piles everywhere, debris stacked up from the prior owners. Junky Rabbit came out and transformed it in a few hours. They hauled everything away too. My neighbors have already asked for their number.

faq.q: Do you haul away the debris after yard cleanup?
faq.a: Yes — full haul-away is included. We don't leave piles at the curb. Everything is loaded and taken with us.

faq.q: Can you clean up a vacant or foreclosed property?
faq.a: Absolutely. Property managers, landlords, and investors frequently use us for vacant lot cleanups before listing or after tenant move-out.

faq.q: Do you mow lawns?
faq.a: We handle mowing on a case-by-case basis. Text us details about your lawn and we'll let you know if it falls within our current scope.

faq.q: How do you quote yard cleanup jobs?
faq.a: Text us a few photos of the yard and your address. We'll send a written quote within minutes — no obligation.

name: Demolition & Hauling
priceNote: Shed removal · deck demolition · debris and dirt hauling
tagline: Shed removal, structural demo, and heavy hauling across Metro Detroit.
description: Need a shed torn down? A deck removed? Dirt or gravel hauled away? Junky Rabbit Labor handles small-scale demolition and heavy hauling projects across Metro Detroit. Our crew brings the tools, does the work, and hauls everything away. We don't sub out — your job is done by our own hands, on schedule and on budget.
includes: Shed and outbuilding demolition and removal
Concrete, brick, and masonry debris hauling
Dirt, gravel, and fill material hauling
All debris hauled away — site left clear
imgAlt: Demolition and hauling service Metro Detroit shed removal

reviews.author: Greg P.
reviews.reviewBody: Needed an old rotting shed torn down and hauled away. Junky Rabbit quoted me a fair price, showed up on the scheduled day, and had it completely gone in about two hours. The yard was clean when they left. No fuss, no hidden costs. Great crew.

reviews.author: Yvonne B.
reviews.reviewBody: Had a deck that needed to come down before we could put in a new one. They came out, pulled it apart, and hauled everything including the concrete footings. Fast work and reasonable price. Highly recommend for any demo job.

faq.q: Do you need permits for demolition work?
faq.a: For most small structures (sheds, fences, decks), permits are not required. For larger or attached structures, we recommend you check with your municipality. We can advise on what we've encountered.

faq.q: Can you haul away concrete and masonry?
faq.a: Yes — concrete slabs, brick, block, and similar heavy materials are hauled away as part of demo jobs. Quantity affects pricing so text us details.

faq.q: How quickly can you start a demo job?
faq.a: Smaller jobs (sheds, fences) can often be scheduled within 1–3 days. Text us for current availability.

faq.q: Do you handle interior demolition?
faq.a: Yes, on a project basis. We've done wall removal, flooring tear-out, and bathroom demolition. Text details and we'll quote it.
